creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
The Ansible ports has been out of date for a while and there is a maintainer-timeout from lifanov@. I have created this patch which handles multiple issues related to all ansible* ports. The builds are so far alright.
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/py37-ansible/2.9.6/
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/py37-ansible28/2.8.10/
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/py37-ansible27/2.7.16/
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/py37-ansible26/2.6.20_1/
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/py37-ansible25/2.5.15_3/
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/py37-ansible24/2.4.6.0_4/
http://pdr.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/py37-ansible23/2.3.3.0_5/
